rationale: In the citing paper, Kim et al. (2011) is cited only briefly in the General Discussion/Future Research section as an example that price-ratio variables can influence receptivity in trade-in contexts. The citation is not used to build the paper's core hypotheses, mechanism tests, or experimental design. The main theoretical framing and evidence for the paper's claims come from other price framing and processing-effort literatures. Thus, this functions as a peripheral background mention rather than a meaningful directional building block.
